headline: CLOSE FINDINGS FOR GOOD
subheading: A risk-based CAPA playbook that turns audit findings into durable, inspector-proof closure.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking the disciplined closure of pharmaceutical audit findings, rendered as a clean conceptual loop. A series of glowing teal and cyan checkpoint nodes connected by a flowing path that curves back on itself, symbolising root-cause investigation, corrective action and effectiveness verification feeding into a closed quality cycle. Floating translucent layers suggest sorted document cards and risk-tiered tags arranged from chaotic to neatly aligned, conveying findings being triaged, traced and resolved. A single fresh-green accent marks the final verified checkpoint where the loop closes, glowing softly against deep navy depth. Brushed-metal precision surfaces, faint concentric ripples implying traceability and accountability, soft volumetric light, premium clinical-luxury aesthetic, shallow depth of field, deep navy background with teal and cyan gradients and one subtle green highlight. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
